title: Highly Multiplexed Spatial Transcriptomics in Bacteria.
author: Sarfatis A Wang Y Twumasi-Ankrah N Moffitt JR
content: S-EPMC11230453 PMC11230453 Highly Multiplexed Spatial Transcriptomics in Bacteria. Single-cell decisions made in complex environments underlie many bacterial phenomena. Image-based transcriptomics approaches offer an avenue to study such behaviors, yet these approaches have been hindered
